leadText: The Devon Scope (Japanese: デボンスコープ Devon Scope) is a Key Item introduced in Generation III. It is one of Devon Corporation's products.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Pokémon Ruby, Sapphire , and Emerald [ edit | edit source ] The Devon Scope allows the player to detect invisible Pokémon . This allows them to battle hidden Kecleon throughout Routes 119 and 120 , and grants them access beyond the northern bridge on Route 120 and enter Fortree Gym . Pokémon Omega Ruby and Alpha Sapphire [ edit | edit source ] The Devon Scope provides the same functions as in the original games, but two extra Kecleon will appear after completing two major story arcs. After dealing with Groudon OR / Kyogre AS , the player can uncover a Kecleon in the ladies' hot springs in Lavaridge Town . After completing the Delta Episode , they can find another Kecleon behind the astronaut face board inside the Mossdeep Space Center . The latter Kecleon has its Hidden Ability , Protean .

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description R S E A device by Devon that signals any unseeable Pok é mon . FR LG A scope that signals the presence of any unseeable Pok é mon . It is made by the Devon Corp . OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA S V A special device made by Devon Corporation that signals the presence of any unseen Pokémon.
